name: Ollama Gemma4 Chat

nodes.name: Manual Trigger
nodes.notes: Start the workflow manually. Replace with a Webhook or Schedule trigger for automated use.

nodes.name: Configure Request

string.name: prompt
string.value: Explain what Ollama is and why running LLMs locally matters.

nodes.notes: Set model name, prompt text, Ollama base URL, and generation options. Change 'gemma3:latest' to 'gemma4' once Ollama publishes the gemma4 tag.

nodes.name: Call Ollama API
nodes.notes: POST to Ollama's /api/generate endpoint. Ollama must be running locally (default port 11434). Use /api/chat for multi-turn conversation support.

nodes.name: Format Response
nodes.notes: Extracts the generated text and performance metrics from the Ollama API response.

parameters.content:
## Ollama Gemma4 Chat Workflow

**Prerequisites:**
1. Install Ollama: `curl -fsSL https://ollama.com/install.sh | sh`
2. Pull the model: `ollama pull gemma3:latest` (update to `gemma4` when released)
3. Ensure Ollama is running on `http://localhost:11434`

**To use a different model**, update the `model` field in **Configure Request**.

nodes.name: Error Handler

parameters.message: ={{ 'Ollama API error: ' + ($json.message || $json.error || 'Unknown error. Ensure Ollama is running at ' + $('Configure Request').first().json.ollama_base_url) }}

nodes.notes: Handles errors from the Ollama API call. Common causes: Ollama not running, model not pulled, or wrong port.

description: Chat with a local Ollama instance using the Gemma4 model (or any Ollama-supported model). Sends a prompt via HTTP to the Ollama /api/generate endpoint and returns the generated text along with token usage and latency metrics.
notes: Production-ready workflow for local LLM inference with Ollama. Requires Ollama running on the host machine. Defaults to gemma3:latest — update the model name to gemma4 once the tag is published to the Ollama registry. Supports swapping to any Ollama-hosted model by changing the 'model' field.
